default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM workflows, campaign prioritization, and Clay enrichment costs.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Clay Enrichment Overhaul:** The Clay enrichment workflow is being rebuilt to fix high costs. The current daily sync re-enriches the entire 17k-record list, causing exponential credit consumption. The new workflow will use a webhook trigger to process records incrementally and will only enrich contacts who show intent (e.g., email reply).](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**New Campaign Priority:** A new "Webflow Lookalike" campaign is now a top priority to build pipeline. It will target companies similar to successful customers (Lovable, Webflow) by offering a workshop recording, then pitching a strategy session to positive repliers.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [**Outreach Strategy Shift:** The team will prioritize outreach to Fletch's LinkedIn followers, as this audience yields a significantly higher reply rate (1:15) than cold prospects. Cold outreach for Fletch and the Answer Engine event will be de-prioritized.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Positive Reply Follow-up:** HubSpot's existing Outbound Sync segments will be used to build a workflow for following up with positive repliers. Natalia will create a new "positive reply" segment to enable targeted outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Topics

### Clay Enrichment Workflow Overhaul

  - [**Problem:** The Clay enrichment workflow is consuming credits at an unsustainable rate.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The workflow's daily sync re-enriches the entire 17k-record HubSpot list, leading to exponential credit consumption.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Solution:** The workflow will be rebuilt with two key changes:](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Trigger:** Switch from a daily sync to a webhook to enable incremental, record-by-record processing.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Scope:** Narrow the HubSpot list trigger to only enrich contacts who show intent (e.g., email reply, new deal created).](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [**Interim Fix:** Natalia will disable the "auto update" toggle in the Clay workbook and columns to stop the current process.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Outreach Campaign Performance & Prioritization

  - [**Recent Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**HeyReach:** 36 positive replies](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**Instantly:** 131 positive replies](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**Fletch:** 109 positive replies](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [**Fletch Campaign Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Followers:** \~10-15k qualified leads from Fletch's LinkedIn followers.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [**Performance:** 109 replies from \~1,500 finished sequences → **1 reply per 15 leads**.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Prioritize this high-performing audience over cold outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Growth Cafe Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Issue:** Low reply rates due to a spam trigger word in the copy.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Action:** Mark has fixed the copy and will relaunch the campaign tomorrow after Gloria's review.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**New "Webflow Lookalike" Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build pipeline by targeting companies similar to successful customers (Lovable, Webflow).](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [**Funnel:** Offer a workshop recording → Nurture via newsletter → Pitch a strategy session to positive repliers.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [**Priority:** High. Mark will build the list today; the campaign will launch this week.](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [**Campaign Priority Stack:**](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
    1.  [Breakfast & Fletch events](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
    2.  ["Webflow Lookalike" campaign](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
    3.  [Answer Engine event](https://fathom.video/share/k1YEsDFyWoNpgDWZz6t3zybRtUxY9aEm?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
